title: App-context entity (per-record frontmatter)
description: Frontmatter of app-context/src/entities/<slug>.md. The prose `description` lives in the markdown body, not here.

slug.description: Kebab-case id; doubles as the filename (minus .md) and the cross-reference target.

properties.description: Common attributes/fields of this entity as shown in the UI. Each item is a bare field name (legacy) or a typed descriptor for realistic generated content.

name.description: Field name as shown in the UI.

type.description: Logical type of the field, used to shape generated form controls and table columns.

example.description: Realistic example value(s) for generated content.

states.description: Enumerated states, when the type is enum.

relationships.description: Map of relationship verb → target entity slug. Referential integrity is enforced by scripts/app-context/validate-app-context.js, not this schema.

apps.description: App slugs where this entity is surfaced.
